falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate extreme volatility and momentum, contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a blowoff top rather than a bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more with a 3-day average volume surge of 150% above the 60-day mean
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal a strong bullish breakout, invalidating the current UNKNOWN verdict by demonstrating a clear trend reversal inconsistent with the bottom_2022_may_luna pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a drastic policy shift would inject liquidity and alter market dynamics, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and invalidating the pattern's assumptions about monetary conditions.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
